title: Data Asset Engine V2 — Weekly Original Data Publications
purpose: Earn passive citations and backlinks without outreach. Create citeable original data.

assets_planned_months_1_3.title: How Much House Can You Afford at Every Salary Level? ($40K–$200K)
assets_planned_months_1_3.content: Table showing affordable home price for each salary level from $40K-$200K, assuming 28% front-end DTI, 6.5% rate, 20% down. Includes monthly payment breakdown.
assets_planned_months_1_3.journalist_angle: Salary vs home affordability in 2026 — quick reference for reporters covering housing affordability

assets_planned_months_1_3.title: Monthly Payment Table for Personal Loans from $5K to $100K
assets_planned_months_1_3.content: Matrix table: loan amounts ($5K-$100K) × interest rates (6%-25%) × terms (3-7 years) = monthly payment. Color-coded by affordability tiers.
assets_planned_months_1_3.journalist_angle: Quick reference for personal finance articles about borrowing costs

assets_planned_months_1_3.title: Debt Snowball vs Avalanche: Which Wins by Debt Size?
assets_planned_months_1_3.content: For debt amounts $5K-$50K, compare snowball vs avalanche: time to payoff, total interest paid, psychological wins. Data table + recommendation.
assets_planned_months_1_3.journalist_angle: Definitive data on which debt strategy works better — frequently debated topic

assets_planned_months_1_3.title: How Much $500/Month Becomes After 10, 20, and 30 Years
assets_planned_months_1_3.content: Invest $100-$5,000/month at 5%-12% returns over 5-40 years. Table showing final portfolio value. Color-coded by milestone ($100K, $500K, $1M, $2M).
assets_planned_months_1_3.journalist_angle: Show the power of consistent investing — very shareable on social media

assets_planned_months_1_3.title: Retirement Savings Reality Table by Age and Savings
assets_planned_months_1_3.content: For ages 30-60 and savings $100K-$5M: can you retire? How long will it last? At what withdrawal rate? Reality check table.
assets_planned_months_1_3.journalist_angle: Retirement reality check — frequently requested by personal finance journalists

assets_planned_months_1_3.title: Salary After Tax: Take-Home Pay in All 50 States
assets_planned_months_1_3.content: For $50K, $75K, $100K, $150K, $200K: take-home pay in every state. Highlight biggest differences (TX/FL vs CA/NY).
assets_planned_months_1_3.journalist_angle: Tax migration story — why people move states

each_asset_must_have: Clear methodology section (how we calculated it)
Embed snippet for journalists to copy-paste
Cite this data section with preformatted citation

success_metrics.minimum: 1 citation or backlink within 60 days of publishing
success_metrics.great: Cited by major publication or ranks for data queries
